content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "租房間",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "房東",
          "text": "你好，請問你要租房間嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn nǐ yào zū fángjiān ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 ni3 yao4 zu1 fang2 jian1 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, are you looking to rent a room?",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 방을 구하시나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "對，我想看看房間。",
          "pinyin": "Duì, wǒ xiǎng kàn kàn fángjiān.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dui4, wo3 xiang3 kan4 kan4 fang2 jian1.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, I'd like to see the room.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 방을 좀 보고 싶어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "房東",
          "text": "好的，這個房間有床、桌子、椅子，還有冷氣。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, zhège fángjiān yǒu chuáng, zhuōzi, yǐzi, hái yǒu lěngqì.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, zhe4 ge5 fang2 jian1 you3 chuang2, zhuo1 zi5, yi3 zi5, hai2 you3 leng3 qi4.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, this room has a bed, a desk, a chair, and also air conditioning.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 이 방에는 침대, 책상, 의자, 그리고 에어컨이 있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "房間很明亮，我很喜歡。房租多少錢？",
          "pinyin": "Fángjiān hěn míngliàng, wǒ hěn xǐhuān. Fángzū duōshao qián?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Fang2 jian1 hen3 ming2 liang4, wo3 hen3 xi3 huan1. Fang2 zu1 duo1 shao3 qian2?",
          "translation_en": "The room is very bright, I like it. How much is the rent?",
          "translation_ko": "방이 매우 밝아서 마음에 들어요. 집세가 얼마인가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "房東",
          "text": "一個月一萬塊，水電費另外算。",
          "pinyin": "Yī ge yuè yī wàn kuài, shuǐ diàn fèi lìngwài suàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Yi1 ge5 yue4 yi1 wan4 kuai4, shui3 dian4 fei4 ling4 wai4 suan4.",
          "translation_en": "10,000 NT per month, utilities are separate.",
          "translation_ko": "한 달에 만 위안이고, 수도·전기 요금은 별도예요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "好，我決定租這個房間。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, wǒ juédìng zū zhège fángjiān.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, wo3 jue2 ding4 zu1 zhe4 ge5 fang2 jian1.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I've decided to rent this room.",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요, 이 방을 빌리기로 결정했어요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What does the room have?",
          "question_ko": "방에는 무엇이 있습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Bed, desk, chair, and air conditioning", "Sofa and TV", "Kitchen and bathroom"],
          "options_ko": ["침대, 책상, 의자, 에어컨", "소파와 TV", "주방과 욕실"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line after the speaker, focusing on tone and natural rhythm.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Describe your ideal apartment room in Chinese."
    },
    {
      "title": "問設備",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "請問，這個公寓有洗衣機嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Qǐng wèn, zhège gōngyù yǒu xǐyījī ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Qing3 wen4, zhe4 ge5 gong1 yu4 you3 xi3 yi1 ji1 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, does this apartment have a washing machine?",
          "translation_ko": "실례합니다, 이 아파트에 세탁기가 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "房東",
          "text": "有，在浴室裡面。",
          "pinyin": "Yǒu, zài yùshì lǐmiàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "You3, zai4 yu4 shi4 li3 mian4.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, it's in the bathroom.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 욕실 안에 있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "那廚房有冰箱嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nà chúfáng yǒu bīngxiāng ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 chu2 fang2 you3 bing1 xiang1 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Does the kitchen have a refrigerator?",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 주방에 냉장고가 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "房東",
          "text": "有，冰箱很大，還有熱水器。",
          "pinyin": "Yǒu, bīngxiāng hěn dà, hái yǒu rèshuǐqì.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "You3, bing1 xiang1 hen3 da4, hai2 you3 re4 shui3 qi4.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, the refrigerator is big, and there's also a water heater.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 냉장고가 매우 크고, 온수기도 있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "太好了，謝謝你。",
          "pinyin": "Tài hǎo le, xièxiè nǐ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Tai4 hao3 le5, xie4 xie4 ni3.",
          "translation_en": "That's great, thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "정말 좋네요, 감사합니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Where is the washing machine?",
          "question_ko": "세탁기는 어디에 있습니까?",
          "options_en": ["In the kitchen", "In the bathroom", "In the living room"],
          "options_ko": ["주방에", "욕실에", "거실에"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each question and answer, paying attention to intonation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Ask about facilities in an apartment you are interested in."
    },
    {
      "title": "冷氣壞掉",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "房東，不好意思，冷氣壞掉了。",
          "pinyin": "Fángdōng, bù hǎo yìsi, lěngqì huài diào le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Fang2 dong1, bu4 hao3 yi4 si5, leng3 qi4 huai4 diao4 le5.",
          "translation_en": "Landlord, excuse me, the air conditioner is broken.",
          "translation_ko": "집주인님, 죄송합니다만 에어컨이 고장 났어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "房東",
          "text": "真的嗎？我明天請人來修理。",
          "pinyin": "Zhēn de ma? Wǒ míngtiān qǐng rén lái xiūlǐ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhen1 de5 ma? Wo3 ming2 tian1 qing3 ren2 lai2 xiu1 li3.",
          "translation_en": "Really? I'll have someone come fix it tomorrow.",
          "translation_ko": "정말요? 내일 수리 기사를 부를게요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "謝謝，因為天氣很熱，沒有冷氣不舒服。",
          "pinyin": "Xièxiè, yīnwèi tiānqì hěn rè, méiyǒu lěngqì bù shūfu.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4 xie4, yin1 wei4 tian1 qi4 hen3 re4, mei2 you3 leng3 qi4 bu4 shu1 fu5.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you, because the weather is very hot, it's uncomfortable without AC.",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다. 날씨가 매우 더워서 에어컨이 없으면 불편해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "房東",
          "text": "沒問題，我會處理。",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí, wǒ huì chǔlǐ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4 ti2, wo3 hui4 chu3 li3.",
          "translation_en": "No problem, I'll take care of it.",
          "translation_ko": "문제없어요, 제가 처리할게요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What is broken?",
          "question_ko": "무엇이 고장 났습니까?",
          "options_en": ["The refrigerator", "The air conditioner", "The washing machine"],
          "options_ko": ["냉장고", "에어컨", "세탁기"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat the dialogue, focusing on expressing concern and reassurance.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Report a problem in your apartment to the landlord."
    }
  ]
}
